name: San Mig Apple
description: A crisp and refreshing apple-flavored beer with a light sweetness and smooth finish.

name: San Mig Light
description: A low-calorie beer with a clean, mild flavor and an easy-drinking profile.

name: San Mig Pilsen
description: The classic Filipino lager with a rich malt taste and balanced bitterness.

name: San Mig Super Dry
description: A premium dry beer with a sharp, refined flavor and extra-smooth aftertaste.

name: Blowjob
description: A creamy and sweet layered shot made with Kahlúa, Baileys, and a touch of whipped cream.

name: 2 Face
description: A colorful double-layered shot that balances fruity sweetness with a bold kick.

name: Green Melon Shot
description: A vibrant melon-flavored shot that’s smooth, sweet, and fun to take in one go.

name: Jagerbomb
description: The ultimate party mix — a shot of Jägermeister dropped into a glass of energy drink.

name: Night Bomb
description: A dark, strong bomb shot combining deep herbal liqueur and an energizing mixer for a late-night buzz.
